title: dryopteris gemmipara
intro: Dryopteris gemmipara, also known as the gemmed wood fern, is a species of fern that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris gemmipara include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a potential treatment for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Dryopteris gemmipara can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
